about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: From repairing PCs to building applications
about.p1: My tech journey began with hardware, diagnosing and optimizing systems. That analytical and troubleshooting mindset led me to take the logical leap into Full Stack software development.
about.p2: I enjoy building robust architectures in the backend and dynamic experiences in the frontend. I don't run away from complex technical challenges; on the contrary, they motivate me.
about.quote: Like in metal: discipline, precision, and passion for what I do.

skills.title: Technical Arsenal
skills.subtitle: The tools with which I forge the code

desc.angular: Development of scalable and reactive SPAs. Experience working with version 21, optimizing components using Signals and Server-Side Rendering (SSR).
desc.typescript: Strict typing for secure, maintainable, and error-proof code in complex architectures.
desc.html: Creation of semantic and accessible structures, ensuring a solid and optimized foundation for search engine optimization (SEO).
desc.css: Design of responsive mobile-first interfaces. Mastery of Flexbox, Grid, and pure CSS animations for fluid visual experiences.
desc.js: Development of asynchronous logic, advanced DOM manipulation, and efficient consumption of REST APIs to bring applications to life.
desc.python: Creation of robust and secure backends with Django. Development of complex data models and construction of scalable APIs.
desc.java: Building solid business logic and object-oriented design patterns for enterprise systems.
desc.android: Creation of native mobile applications focused on performance, efficient memory management, and user experience.
desc.mysql: Design of relational schemas and optimization of complex queries for efficient management in high-demand systems.
desc.sqlite: Implementation of lightweight and fast databases, ideal for applications with local storage or development environments.
desc.postgres: Handling advanced relational databases, ensuring integrity, concurrency, and massive scalability of data.
desc.tools: Configuration and advanced handling of cross-platform development environments (Windows and Linux), maximizing software lifecycle productivity.
desc.git: Distributed version control. Expert handling of branching and clean workflows to ensure the integrity of the source code.
desc.pc: Deep diagnosis, assembly, and hardware optimization. This 'low-level' vision allows me to understand and optimize how software physically impacts the machine.

projects.title: Main Project
projects.subtitle: Where code becomes a real product
projects.marketStack: Full Stack Application | Angular + Django REST + MySQL
projects.marketDesc: Scalable e-commerce platform developed from scratch. The architecture includes secure authentication (JWT), dynamic shopping cart, and a complete admin panel. It stands out for its integration with payment gateways (MercadoPago) and an advanced balance management system with support for cryptocurrency withdrawals (USDT TRC20).
